Package org.eventb.core.tool

package org.eventb.core.tool
  • Related Packages

    org.eventb.core
     
  • Interfaces
    Class
    Description
    IFilterModule
    Basic type for filter modules.
    IModule
    The core tools, static checker (org.eventb.core.sc) and proof obligation generator (org.eventb.core.pog), are composed of modules (IModule).
    IModuleType<T extends IModule>
     
    IProcessorModule
    Basic type for processor modules.
    IState
    Common protocol for states store in a state repository (IStateRepository).
    IStateRepository<I extends IState>
    The state repository allows different modules to share state.
    IStateType<T extends IState>
